positive: An intricate watercolor illustration of a dense, overgrown jungle scene. Focus on tropical flora, exotic butterflies, and hidden stone ruins. Soft, muted color palette (deep greens, teal, terracotta), highly detailed, botanical art style, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital painting, cyberpunk
